_description: Tracks Claude Code (terminal) token usage per session. Compares actual API-equivalent cost (at standard Anthropic pricing) against the Claude Pro subscription cost. The savings is what you avoided paying in API credits by being on Pro.
_how_to_log: After each Claude Code session, add an entry to 'sessions' with the token counts from the session summary. Claude Code shows total tokens at the end of each session.

_pricing.note: Standard Anthropic API pricing as of April 2026. Pro subscription replaces this with a flat monthly fee.

subscription.note: Flat monthly fee regardless of token usage. Daily amortized cost = $20 / 30 = ~$0.67/day
